build_check.note: A single apparent SSWTests failure (FGameHeaderDependencyTest) occurs only when the binary is run from the worktree root; it is a cwd-sensitive source-contract test and passes under make check / from tests/.

warning: W1 — SF-nested-load-returns: FPlayer::load/FFleet::load discard nested v->load()/f->load() returns; deep-truncation input can bypass FGame::load's aggregate abort. Data-integrity, not memory-safety. Known, tracked, correctly-scoped deferral; acceptable, not blocking.
note: N1 — SF-nullfmap-paint-guard: gui paint chain lacks a NULL-FMap guard; P5-5 onOpen setGame-deferral closes the reachable trigger; root-cause gui guard deferred and tracked.
N2 — SF-enum-codes: weapon/defense enum ordinals still serialized by raw value; within decision-2 LE-platform scope; explicitly deferred and retained. Not a gap.
N3 — SF-fhexmap: tactical FHexMap::save/load stub correctly out of scope and retained. Not a gap.

follow_up_feature_requests: FR-1 (W1/SF-nested-load-returns): In FPlayer::load check/propagate v->load() (m_unattached and m_destroyed loops) and f->load() (fleet loop), and in FFleet::load check/propagate v->load() per ship; on nonzero nested return delete the just-created object and return nonzero so FGame::load's abort and loader error UX fire. Add a behavioral test truncating a stream inside a fleet's ship record asserting FGame::load returns nonzero, reports via mock IStrategicUI, and leaves no live game singleton. Scope: P5-3 files (src/strategic/FPlayer.cpp, src/strategic/FFleet.cpp).

FR-2 (N1/SF-nullfmap-paint-guard): Add a root-cause NULL/invalid-FMap guard in the gui draw chain (WXMapDisplay::getScale or earlier in FGamePanel::onPaint/WXGameDisplay::draw) so a FGamePanel shown with an unset/half-built FMap cannot dereference it, independent of the onOpen mitigation; add a gui behavioral test forcing a repaint with game/map unset asserting no crash. Scope: gui module.
